title: I'll Change My Fate
overview: Kyle is sent back in time after his fateful fight with the demon king and swears to save the world this time.

title: The Hero's Conditions
overview: Kyle sets about making preparations for his heroic journey and the fight to come.

title: Application of the Contract
overview: Kyle reunites with some old companions in new ways before making his first major play to change the future.

title: The Perfect Start to a Heroic Tale
overview: To save the ill-fated Princess Milena, Kyle must brave a danger the likes of which he's never faced before.

title: Reunion at Dawn
overview: Old friends become enemies as Kyle comes up with a plan to get Princess Milena to safety.

title: Brothers in Arms
overview: Kyle's party is celebrated for rescuing the princess, but they're given no time to rest on their laurels.

title: To the Blacksmith's Nation
overview: Kyle's party arrives in Karan and becomes embroiled in tensions between Zirgus and the Gargan Empire.

title: Those Who Act Out of Sight
Hidden Ambitions
overview: Kyle insists on finding the secret underground passage hidden beneath Karan.

title: Duel
overview: The demons agree to formally duel Kyle's party for the holy sword and information.

title: Secret Red-Hot Strategy
overview: Kyle and his companions acquire surprising new information about demons.

title: The Heroic Tale Continues
overview: Kyle's party concludes their business in Karan, but ominous clouds can be seen on the horizon.
